subcodes.first_line: That which thou didst send hath arrived, and the servant in attendance before the Wronged One hath laid it before Us. We have hearkened unto it and do thus respond to thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر ما ارسلته و عرضه العبد الحاضر لدی المظلوم انا سمعناه و اجبناک بهذا
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
